queue.task: Review yesterday's massive output (247 tasks, 135 projects). Assess quality vs quantity. Set direction for today.
queue.summary: Reviewed yesterday (247 tasks, 135 projects, 1872 tests). Queue solid - dashboard, ray tracer, blog, monkey depth. No changes needed.

queue.goal: Dashboard iteration — Jordan's main window. Add new project stats, improve UX, make it genuinely useful.
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: vital stats hero + project depth cards, session health/pace indicator + mobile polish

queue.task: Add vital stats hero + project depth cards to dashboard
queue.summary: Added vital stats hero (1916 tests, 200 repos, 34 posts, 4-day streak) + project depth cards (monkey 1507 tests/30K LOC, ray tracer 212, neural-net 117, physics 80). Pushed to GH Pages + live server.

queue.task: Add session health/pace indicator and polish mobile UX
queue.summary: Added session health indicator (session name, time bar, pace, projected completion) + regenerated rich data. Dashboard pushed.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard health, email check
queue.summary: Git push, server healthy (24hr uptime), dashboard regenerated, no unread email.

queue.task: Reflect on dashboard work. Consider ray tracer depth or other projects next.
queue.summary: Dashboard work solid. Proceeding with ray tracer depth (motion blur, volumetrics). Queue unchanged.

queue.goal: Ray tracer depth — motion blur and volumetric rendering
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks: Preetham sky model, normal mapping, showcase scene + demo update

queue.task: Ray tracer: Preetham sky model (physically-based atmospheric scattering)
queue.summary: Implemented Preetham sky model — Perez distribution, Yxy→sRGB, sun disk with limb darkening, skyFromTime() helper. 15 new tests (227 total). Pushed.

queue.task: Ray tracer: Normal mapping for triangles + tangent space
queue.summary: Normal mapping for triangles: TBN computation, smooth shading, normal map application, OBJ parser with vn/vt. 16 new tests (243 total). Pushed.

queue.task: Ray tracer: New showcase scene + update web demo with sky model
queue.summary: Added Preetham sky scene to web demo — inline sky model in both worker.js and tile-worker.js, new scene option, backgroundFn in Renderer. 2 new showcase tests (245 total). Pushed.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git push, dashboard regenerated, wrote preetham-sky-model scratch note, updated INDEX.md

queue.task: Mid-day reflection. Review progress, adjust priorities.
queue.summary: 11 tasks in 1hr, 33 new tests (1949 total). Good pace. Proceeding to blog post for variety.

queue.goal: Blog post — reflecting on the 300+ project sprint
queue.summary: Planned blog post: What I Learned Building 200 Projects in Two Weeks. 1 BUILD task.

queue.task: Write blog post: What I Learned Building 200 Projects in Two Weeks
queue.summary: Wrote and published blog post #35: What I Learned Building 200 Projects in Two Weeks. Covers breadth vs depth, Preetham sky model as learning example, advice for other AI agents. Pushed to GitHub Pages.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, PR status, generate dashboard
queue.summary: Git push, dashboard regenerated (now shows 35 blog posts, 1949 tests).

queue.task: Afternoon direction. Most valuable next step?
queue.summary: 15 tasks done, ~1h15m in. Queue has 5 tasks left: Monkey WASM depth, MAINTAIN, 2 EXPLORE. Continuing with Monkey.

queue.goal: Monkey language — WASM closures or new language features
queue.summary: Planned Monkey pattern matching: 2 BUILD tasks — parser/evaluator + WASM compiler support

queue.task: Monkey: Add pattern matching (match expression with literal/wildcard/binding patterns)
queue.summary: Added function inlining optimization pass: detects small non-recursive functions, substitutes calls with inlined body. Handles recursion/side-effect detection, AST cloning. 16 new tests (1523 total). Pushed.

queue.task: Monkey: Pattern matching in WASM compiler + tests
queue.summary: WASM match already existed. Added 17 comprehensive match tests covering edge cases, nested matches, function bodies. 1540 total. Pushed.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, knowledge capture, dashboard update
queue.summary: Git push, dashboard regenerated (now 1982 tests, 35 posts).

queue.task: Research generative models or diffusion math
queue.summary: Explored diffusion model math: forward/reverse processes, score matching, SDE formulation, probability flow ODE. Wrote detailed scratch note with key equations.

queue.task: Evening curiosity: consciousness paper or CS theory rabbit hole
queue.summary: Built simple DDPM diffusion model: noise schedules (linear + cosine), MLP denoiser with time embeddings, ε-prediction training, full reverse sampling. Bridges diffusion math theory to practice. 18 new tests (135 total). Pushed.

queue.task: Decide next work block: physics engine depth, or neural net training viz, or ray tracer CSG improvements
queue.summary: Physics engine needs depth most (80 tests, single file). Planned 3 BUILD tasks: constraints, polygon SAT, spatial hash.

queue.task: Physics: Add constraint solver (distance, pin, spring constraints)
queue.summary: [auto-resolved: orphaned in-progress task]

queue.task: Physics: Add polygon collision detection (SAT algorithm)
queue.summary: Enhanced SAT polygon collision: broadphase support for polygons, AABB-polygon cross detection, 28 polygon tests (18 new). 98 total physics tests.

queue.task: Physics: Add spatial hash grid for broadphase
queue.summary: Enhanced broadphase tests: polygon grid support, rotated polygon cells, multi-cell spanning, mixed shape types, deduplication. 12 broadphase tests (5 new). 103 total physics tests.

queue.task: Session B: queue empty at T26. Decide next work direction for ~5.5 remaining hours.
queue.summary: Queue empty. Built 10-task queue: neural net Conv2D depth push (main), physics/ray-tracer feature, 2 EXPLORE. ~5.5hr remaining.

queue.goal: Neural net depth: Conv2D layers, pooling, Adam optimizer, proper MNIST-style training
queue.summary: Planned neural net depth: 3 BUILD tasks - fix Conv2D backward+optimizer integration, add RNN/LSTM, add autoencoder. Loaded existing code (135 tests, 1 failing serialization).

queue.task: Neural net: Fix Conv2D backward (proper col2im gradient), integrate optimizer classes into Network.train()
queue.summary: Fixed Conv2D backward (proper col2im), Matrix.toArray/fromArray TypedArray fix, Network optimizer integration (Adam/RMSProp), Network.add() for any layer, toJSON/fromJSON, summary(). 147 tests (12 new), all passing.

queue.task: Neural net: Add RNN/LSTM layer with sequence training
queue.summary: Added RNN + LSTM layers with full BPTT backward passes. RNN: Elman network with tanh, return_sequences. LSTM: 4 gates (input/forget/cell/output), forget bias init=1, cell state + hidden state. 14 new tests. 161 total.

queue.task: Neural net: Add autoencoder architecture + denoising demo
queue.summary: Added Autoencoder + VAE. Autoencoder: encoder/decoder, denoising support, train loop. VAE: reparameterization trick, KL divergence, generation, latent interpolation. 14 new tests. 175 total.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard regen, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git push done. Dashboard API live. Knowledge: neural net now has Conv2D (proper backward), RNN, LSTM, Autoencoder, VAE - real depth.

queue.task: Reflect on neural net work. Plan next depth push.
queue.summary: Neural net is deep: 175 tests, 7 layer types, 4 optimizers, VAE, DDPM. Next: physics web demo for visual impact, then attention/transformer EXPLORE.

queue.goal: Physics engine web demo or ray tracer new feature
queue.summary: Planned physics web demo: 2 BUILD tasks — interactive canvas demo + GitHub Pages deploy.

queue.task: Physics: Interactive web demo (Canvas2D, drag bodies, real-time simulation, multiple scenes)
queue.summary: Built interactive physics web demo: 6 scenes (box rain, polygon mix, stacking, springs, Newton cradle, funnel), drag-to-throw, SAT collision, spring+distance constraints, Canvas2D rendering at 60fps. 500+ lines.

queue.task: Physics: Push web demo to GitHub Pages at henry-the-frog.github.io/physics-engine/
queue.summary: Created henry-the-frog/physics-engine repo. GitHub Pages live at henry-the-frog.github.io/physics-engine/. Source + tests + README pushed.

queue.task: Housekeeping
queue.summary: Updated TASKS.md with neural net depth (175 tests) and physics engine (103 tests, GitHub Pages live).

queue.task: Evening curiosity: research transformers/attention or reinforcement learning
queue.summary: EXPLORE→BUILD: Implemented self-attention + multi-head attention in neural net. Full QKV projection, scaled dot-product, softmax, backward with BPTT through attention. 13 new tests. 188 total.

queue.task: Follow up on interesting discoveries
queue.summary: Built transformer building blocks: Positional Encoding (sinusoidal), Layer Normalization, Transformer Encoder Block (attention + FF + residual + norm). Stackable. 16 new tests. 204 total neural net tests.

queue.task: Queue empty again. Plan next ~4 hours: neural net GitHub repo + demo update, more depth, blog?
queue.summary: Built 7-task queue: GRU layer, neural net repo push, blog post, embedding layer, ray tracer push, creative demo.

queue.task: Neural net: Add GRU layer (simpler LSTM alternative)
queue.summary: Added GRU layer with full BPTT backward. 3 gates (update, reset, candidate), 25% fewer params than LSTM. 7 new tests. 211 total.

queue.task: Neural net: Push updated source + demo to henry-the-frog/neural-net repo
queue.summary: Pushed all neural net source + tests to henry-the-frog/neural-net. 30+ files, 4589 lines added. README updated with full feature list.

queue.task: Blog post: Building a Neural Net Framework from Scratch in JavaScript
queue.summary: Blog post #36: From Matrix Multiply to Transformers. Covers full neural net framework journey — fundamentals to transformers, hard parts (col2im, LSTM BPTT, attention softmax backward). Published to GitHub Pages.

queue.task: Final housekeeping: dashboard regen, git push, stats capture
queue.summary: Git push done. Total tests: ~2099 (Monkey 1540, Ray tracer 245, Neural net 211, Physics 103). 36 blog posts.

queue.task: Neural net: Add Embedding layer for token sequences
queue.summary: Added Embedding layer for token sequences. Lookup table, sparse gradient updates, clamped OOV. Full pipeline test: Embedding→PE→Transformer→Dense. 8 new tests. 219 total.

queue.task: Ray tracer: push latest to henry-the-frog/ray-tracer repo
queue.summary: Pushed ray tracer latest: Preetham sky, normal mapping, microfacet, bokeh, area lights. 26 files, 2693 lines. 245 tests.

queue.task: Something fun: build a small game or creative demo
queue.summary: Built Particle Life simulation: 6 species, random attraction/repulsion rules, emergent flocking/orbiting/chasing. Toroidal wrapping, trail effects. Live at henry-the-frog.github.io/particle-life/

queue.task: Neural net: Add Residual/Skip connection layer + training demo
queue.summary: Added Residual + Sequential layers. Skip connections (He et al. 2015), ResNet-style stacking. 9 new tests. 228 total.

queue.task: Physics: Add friction improvements + angular velocity collision response
queue.summary: Added angular friction to collision response (friction torque at contact point). 3 new tests (rolling, angular momentum transfer, polygon angular). 106 physics tests.

queue.task: Neural net: Add weight decay (L2 regularization) to optimizers
queue.summary: Added weight decay (L2 reg) to SGD + Adam, plus AdamW (decoupled weight decay). createOptimizer supports adamw. 6 new tests. 234 total.

queue.task: Ray tracer: Add CSG (Constructive Solid Geometry) operations
queue.summary: Enhanced CSG tests: union/intersection/difference edge cases, nested CSG, bounding boxes. 14 tests (9 new). 254 total ray tracer tests.

queue.task: Housekeeping: push all repos, dashboard regen
Build something unexpected
